description: Rate assumptions for monthly ROI calculation. Dubai/UK/US market rates only. Never Indian pricing.

rate_context.conservative: Dubai boutique consultancy / specialized forensic analyst ($200/hr) — floor rate for comparable intelligence work
rate_context.realistic: Senior FTI Consulting / Kroll / Control Risks specialist ($500/hr) — market-standard for PE-grade forensic intelligence
rate_context.high_end: McKinsey / Bain / BCG / Roland Berger partner rate ($950/hr) — top-tier strategy firms deliver this quality at this rate

hours_multipliers.comment: Realistic human-equivalent hours per artifact. Installed/configured tools use installed_multiplier rates (faster). Built-from-scratch use built_multiplier rates.
hours_multipliers._explanation: Tools with 'auto_scanned: true' in registry were installed (via plugin/git clone) - use _installed_configured rates. Manually registered via register-tool.sh = built from scratch - use _built_from_scratch rates. Top-level rates are the 'built from scratch' defaults.

notes: Rates benchmarked to real 2026 market comparables: McKinsey PE DD ($800K-$2.5M), Bain market entry ($500K-$1.5M), FTI forensic intelligence ($200K-$1M), Accenture AI deployment ($500K-$5M). Not inflated — defensible against what the market actually pays for comparable deliverables.
